SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationTable

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationBlockElement, AIiDocumentationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationTable
public interface AIiDocumentationTable extends AIiDocumentationBlockElement
Represents a tabular block element.

A table consists of column definitions and rows. Cells are associated with columns through column identifiers, which allows renderers to keep cell values stable even if column order changes. Cell content may contain inline elements such as links and semantic references.

This interface provides read-only access. Construction and transformation code that needs to modify the table should use AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AIiDocumentationTableColumn>
    getColumns()
    Returns table columns in their rendering order.
    List<AIiDocumentationTableRow>
    getRows()
    Returns table rows in their rendering order.
    String
    getTableTitle()
    Returns the human-readable table title.

    Methods inherited from interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIiDocumentationElement

    getElementId, getMetadata, getMetadataValue

  • Method Details

    • getTableTitle

      String getTableTitle()
      Returns the human-readable table title.

      An empty string means that no title is available.

      Returns:
      table title, or an empty string if no title is available

    • getColumns

      List<AIiDocumentationTableColumn> getColumns()
      Returns table columns in their rendering order.
      Returns:
      read-only ordered column list

    • getRows

      List<AIiDocumentationTableRow> getRows()
      Returns table rows in their rendering order.
      Returns:
      read-only ordered row list
